ham.subject: AWS Monthly Usage Summary – March 2026
ham.body:
Dear [Name],

Here is your AWS usage report for March 2026. Your total cost for this billing cycle was $1,240.35, which is 8% higher than the previous month.

Key metrics:
- Compute: 3200 CPU‑hrs ($740)
- Storage: 45 TB (S3) ($200)
- Data Transfer: 3 TB (outbound) ($300)
- Other services: $200

You can review detailed usage and cost allocation here: <URL>.

If you have any questions or need assistance, reply to this email or open a support ticket in the AWS Console.

Thank you for using AWS.

Best regards,
AWS Billing Team

spam.subject: URGENT: Verify Your AWS Account to Avoid Suspension
spam.body:
IMPORTANT: Your AWS Account Has Been Suspended

Dear [Customer],

The AWS Security Team has detected suspicious activity on your account (Account ID: XXXXXXXXXX) and has temporarily suspended it to protect your data. If you do not take immediate action, the account will be permanently disabled and all resources will be terminated within 24 hours.

Please confirm your identity and reset your password here: <URL>.

Failure to comply will result in the loss of all data stored in your account.

If you believe this is a mistake, contact AWS Support immediately.

Sincerely,
AWS Security Team
